/usr/lib/ccache/gcc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,sjtu_drone_description_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/sjtu_drone_description/sjtu_drone_description_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/sjtu_drone_description__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/sjtu_drone_description/_sjtu_drone_description_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/gazebo-11/plugins  -L/home/j/INCSL/IICC26_ws/src/sjtu_drone-ros2/sjtu_drone_description/Boost::thread  -L/home/j/INCSL/IICC26_ws/src/sjtu_drone-ros2/sjtu_drone_description/Boost::date_time  -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/gazebo-11/plugins:/home/j/INCSL/IICC26_ws/src/sjtu_drone-ros2/sjtu_drone_description/Boost::thread:/home/j/INCSL/IICC26_ws/src/sjtu_drone-ros2/sjtu_drone_description/Boost::date_time:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so:/home/j/INCSL/IICC26_ws/build/sjtu_drone_description/rosidl_generator_py/sjtu_drone_description:/home/j/INCSL/IICC26_ws/build/sjtu_drone_description:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/sjtu_drone_description/libsjtu_drone_description__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libsjtu_drone_description__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libsjtu_drone_description__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
